text:
(Also known as G.U.E.K.) is an organization that deals with the beings that attack humanity. It first appears in the Shin 765 Operation attraction as part of the Shin Japan Heroes Universe collaboration. https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000704.000033062.html 

Profile

It is an organization that monitors paranormal phenomena and extraterrestrial life forms that are occurring all over the world. In addition to monitoring and analysis, it also plays a dynamic role in preventing dangers to humanity.

History

Shin 765 Operation

Players will be contacted by the Secretary of G.U.E.K. to deal with the incidents and crises caused by Godzilla, Angels, Extraterrestrials, and SHOCKER. The organization is in control of the B-765 Base. https://twitter.com/SJHA_World/status/1549593411983851520 12:13 AM · Jul 20, 2022
